title: Stockkii T-ONE Resource Pack
description: A HUD Resource Pack wich is inspired by BastiGHG!
body:
# Stockkii T-ONE: The only HUD resource pack you'll ever need!

<details>
<summary>Main features</summary>

- Saphire blue color theme
- Interesting and clean hotbar, heart and hungerbar design!
- Slightly adjusted netherite armor (a little bit of blue tint and adjusted blacks to achieve a more matching color for netherite)
- More slim and modern font
- New sky (with optifine) and sun/moon (does work with sodium)


</details>



<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

- Changed worldborder texture
- Removed pumpkin blur overlay
- Small text when using the spyglass
- No underwater fog
- A few small tweaks in the survival and creative inventory (small text and background)
- Darker Cobwebs (for better count visibility)
- Low Shield and Fire

</details>



</details>


> More coming soon
> ### made with love, by Stockkii <3
